problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
